tasks.title: Migration + core/skillstore: four tables (CHECK'd enums, one-production + one-active-trial partial unique indexes), the single Transition state machine with mandatory rationale + ledger append, row validation (predicate vocabulary, pinned rejection, 8KiB body cap)

scenarios: A version row is created only with a rationale and a valid predicate
Every status transition goes through Transition and lands in the ledger
A second production version structurally supersedes the first
A draft targeting a pinned skill is rejected

tasks.title: Compose-from-store: agent/skills/store.go (NewFromStore, declarative predicate evaluation, compiled-order composition, pinned always-compiled, total compiled fallback with recorded reason), boot importer of the compiled library, ComposeSeed activity swap + per-session skill_load record

scenarios: Composition from the store is a pure function of typed signals
A store failure composes the compiled registry in full and records the fallback
A pinned skill composes its compiled body even when a store row targets it
The composed skill list is recorded so the seed is reconstructable

tasks.title: Read surface: GET /v1/skills, /v1/skills/{name} (version history + rationale log + eval scores + ledger seqs + diffable bodies), /v1/skills/trials — AuthReadOnly, registered through the mandatory-auth router

scenarios: The library read surface exposes versions with rationale and scores
An unauthenticated skill read is refused

tasks.title: Write path: create-draft / admit-to-trial / promote / retire / abort routes on the operator-session principal; machine principals read-only; every write ledger-recorded via Transition

scenarios: A machine principal has no write route
An operator write without a rationale is refused

tasks.title: Trial engine: in-compose blake2b arm assignment (read-before-hash, malformed-ref counter, control-arm elision), WelchOneSided with golden-value tests pinned to the predecessor Python outputs, skill-trial-finalizer Temporal cron (timeout sweep then finalize), traffic-aware start refusal

scenarios: Arm assignment is deterministic, idempotent, and rejects malformed refs
The finalizer sweeps timeouts before finalizing
Graduation requires samples, lift, the Welch test, and a healthy safety dimension
A trial that cannot complete at the observed session rate is refused

tasks.title: Graduation guards + rollback: holdout-integrity rail (held promotion = row + escalation entry), post-graduation breaker regression watch with auto-retire + prior-production restore + ledger + escalation

scenarios: A tripped breaker auto-retires the graduate and restores the prior production version

tasks.title: Candidate generation flywheel: eval-failure + resolved-incident draft sources (generate-only, rationale + source on every row, dedup, 8KiB cap), Temporal cron on by default

scenarios: A generated draft carries its rationale and has no effect until admitted

tasks.title: Offline admission gate: candidate-vs-production harness run wired to the eval sets (regression must hold, discovery must improve the target dimension, sealed holdout untouched), offline scores stored on the version row

scenarios: A draft that regresses the regression set is not admitted to a trial
The sealed holdout is not read during admission

tasks.title: Console panels + metrics: library list (fallback banner, status chips, sparklines), editor (predicate builder, mandatory rationale), version diff with ledger links, trial dashboard (dead-man indicator), flywheel feed; Prometheus metric set + runbook

scenarios: The trial dashboard exposes arm health and assignment staleness

tasks.title: Flywheel creation-half wiring: daily generator cron (regressed-dimension detection over the rolling judged means, generate-only + dedup), the production offline admission runner (candidate-vs-production on the skill's own recent judged incidents via the shared judge, sealed holdout untouched), and admit->start orchestration wired behind the worker DB block (competence-plane, mutation stays OFF)

scenarios: The creation cron generates for a regressed dimension, admits, and starts one trial
The creation cron refuses to start a trial that traffic cannot complete
